results.prompt: List up to 20 open support tickets with urgent priority.
results.output:
```sql
SELECT ticket_id, subject, status, priority
FROM support_tickets
WHERE status = 'open' AND priority = 'urgent'
LIMIT 20;
```

| Ticket ID | Subject | Status | Priority |
|-----------|---------|--------|----------|
| TK-1001 | Login failure on mobile app | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1002 | Payment gateway timeout | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1003 | Data export crashing | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1004 | API rate limit exceeded | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1005 | SSO integration broken | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1006 | Dashboard loading error | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1007 | File upload 500 error | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1008 | User permissions reset | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1009 | Search index corruption | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1010 | Webhook delivery failed | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1011 | License activation error | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1012 | Report generation timeout | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1013 | Email notification loop | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1014 | Database connection pool exhausted | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1015 | Cache invalidation failure | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1016 | SSL certificate mismatch | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1017 | Backup restoration error | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1018 | User session hijacking alert | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1019 | Third-party API downtime | Open | Urgent |
| TK-1020 | Custom field validation crash | Open | Urgent |
